alert_summary: Inter-service communication failures detected across the data center fabric.

alert_timeline.message: Service health check failing — no response from endpoint
VLAN adjacency lost on access port
Packet drop rate elevated on WAN-facing interface

candidate_ranking.reason: Peripheral node — no direct evidence of involvement
On the propagation path between DC-SRV-01 and DC-FW-01
Firewall sits on all flows between impacted nodes and the upstream network
Peripheral node — no direct evidence of involvement
On the propagation path between DC-SRV-01 and DC-FW-01
Peripheral node — no direct evidence of involvement

reasoning_steps: 1. First symptom observed at DC-SRV-01 — server reports connectivity degradation.
2. Alert propagation traced upstream: DC-FW-01 → DC-CORE-SW-01 → DC-AGG-SW-01 → DC-SRV-01.
3. DC-FW-01 has highest topological reach — zero or minimal in-degree, maximum out-degree.
4. All impacted nodes (DC-CORE-SW-01, DC-AGG-SW-01, DC-SRV-01…) are downstream-reachable from DC-FW-01.
5. Candidate ranking confirms DC-FW-01 as primary root cause (score: 0.76).
recommended_actions: Check core switch interface error counters and spanning tree state
Review firewall policy change audit logs for recent modifications
Verify load balancer health probe responses from backend servers
Inspect physical link status on affected uplinks and trunk ports
